title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Crompton Greaves - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Crompton Greaves - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Crompton Greaves are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Crompton Greaves:
Crompton Greaves is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
